lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Welcome to the Windbreaker. We've got the best drinks around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's with those big gates out there?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: I couldn't tell you to be honest. They've been here for a very long time. Apparently they came in quite useful during the war, and these days they do help stop any undesirable beasts wandering into town.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Anyway, did you want to buy a drink?
